description_long: This object is a rectangular box set containing ten individual volumes, each with a spine numbered 1 through 10. The front face features a vivid, cinematic illustration with three people in the foreground and a science fiction-themed background, including a circular portal and dramatic skies. The top and sides of the box are solid black, giving it a sleek, uniform appearance. The front and one end display the title 'STARGATE SG-1' along with additional artwork and branding. The opposite end shows a list of contents and technical information, set against a fiery, clouded background. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, glossy cardboard or thin plastic material, typical of media box sets.
description: A rectangular, black media box set with vivid sci-fi artwork and numbered spines, labeled 'STARGATE SG-1'. The box is sleek, with detailed illustrations and branding on the front and ends.
description_view_0: The front view shows the ten numbered spines with a continuous sci-fi illustration and three prominent figures.
description_view_1: This end view displays the 'STARGATE SG-1' title, circular portal artwork, and the main cast.
description_view_2: The back view is solid black, showing no artwork or text.
description_view_3: This end view features a fiery, clouded background with a list of contents and technical details.
